title: Herios' Pipez
description: Resource pack for the Pipez mod.
body:
##### Feedback is appreciated!
A little retexture of the [Pipez](https://modrinth.com/mod/pipez) mod made by [henkelmax](https://modrinth.com/user/henkelmax), all credits for the mod go to him. This Resource Pack polishes the mod's texture and gives it a more vanilla-like look.

### Featuring retextures of:
- All pipe types
- All items
- GUIs

***

![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_d4f436ff-74eb-442d-b435-70869c8e05b2.png)

***
